Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class DataObjectDataChgEvent

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.DataObjectDataChgEvent
public class DataObjectDataChgEvent extends SObject

Java class for DataObjectDataChgEvent complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="DataObjectDataChgEvent">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ActionDeveloperName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventCreationDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventPrompt" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventPublishDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventSchemaVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventUuid" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Offset" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PayloadCurrentValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PayloadMetadata" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PayloadPrevValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PayloadSchema" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReplayId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SourceObjectDeveloperName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
